title: VS: Anchors
description: Anchors, docking station and more! For your Valkyrien Skies physics boats
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68114f0fb19cad4844d926d2125991eedaef30cc.png)
## This mod adds Anchors, a Dock Block that pulls the boat towards the block,
and then performs the same anchoring effect as the regular Anchor!

### boat stopped by clicking the anchor
![boat stopped by clicking the anchor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de972c2ae9f61e3de16938d46943194a8ba1af6d_0.webp)

### Ship pulled to the block cause it was in a 10 block range,
AND.. auto docked!
![ship pulled to the block cause it was in a 10 block range, AND.. auto docked](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b57fb4eb25783c1b95fc268cce02fdcdc9641e7.png)
